title: Voyria pittieri
intro: Voyria pittieri, also known as "Monkey Face Plant", is a species of carnivorous plant belonging to the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been found to have potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. The bioactive constituents of Voyria pittieri include alkaloids, glycosides, and flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, which is often used to treat various ailments, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
taxonomy: Voyria pittieri is a member of the family Gentianaceae. It belongs to the order Gentianales and the class Magnoliopsida. At the family level, it is part of the Gentianaceae family, commonly known as the gentian family. The family Gentianaceae is further classified under the division Magnoliophyta and the kingdom Plantae. This classification indicates that Voyria pittieri is a flowering plant with a specific evolutionary history.
